hooks.command: bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */Echo9/PLAN.md) echo "BLOCKED: PLAN.md is the locked design contract. Re-prompt the user for explicit authorization before editing." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); case "$CMD" in *"git commit"*) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/game" && { npx tsc --noEmit && npx oxlint && npx vitest run --reporter=dot; } || { echo "BLOCKED: verification trinity (tsc + oxlint + vitest) failed. Fix errors before committing." >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac'
bash -c 'case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/game" && npx oxlint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | tail -20 ; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac'
